urdu transliteration text:
Kya Daikhti Hai Sughra Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
Manzer Hai Kerbala Ka Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: What does Sughra see in Zaynab's tears The story of Karbala is in Zaynab’s (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Barchi Ka Zakhm Taaza Ta Zindagi Rahay Gaa
Akbar Ka Hai Kalayja Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: The wound of the arrow will stay fresh for a life time. It is Akbar's (a) arrow-bound heart in Zaynab's (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Sughra Nazar Uthao Qasim Ka Haal Daikho
Bikhra Hua Hai Laasha Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: Sughra look up and see what has become of Qasim (a), There’s a scattered body in Zaynab's (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Aey Deeda-e-Tasaver Tujh Ko Dikhaee Day Gaa
Chota Sa Aik Jhoola Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: If you look closely you will be able to see A small crib in Zaynab's (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Zindan-e-Shaam Mei Hai Choti Si Qabar Laikin
Mojoud Hai Sakina Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: There’s is a small grave in the prison of Shaam, Sakina still is present in Zainab's (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Shabbir Paysh-e-Davar Jaeyngai Saath Lay Ker
Bheega Hua Amaama Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: When Shabbir (a) will go before Allah (swt) he will have with him, his turban that is soaked with Zaynab's (a) tears

urdu transliteration text:
Bay Pardagi Ka Aalam Kaisay Adeel Likhay
Khud Daikhlay Zamana Zaynab Kay Aansuon Mei
english translation text: How will Adeel narrate the story of the hijabs being taken, the pain is clear for the world to see in Zaynab's (a) tears
